metadata.source: STA + GEA + MOT + RCU + SHA + SCTH
metadata.source_ar: هيئة السياحة السعودية + هيئة الترفيه + وزارة السياحة + الهيئة الملكية لمحافظة العلا + هيئة التراث + الهيئة السعودية للسياحة
metadata.notes: Saudi tourism and hospitality licensing, hotel classification, entertainment permits, and salary benchmarks as of Q1 2025. Tourism licensing is now managed via the unified tourism platform (mt.gov.sa).

tourism_hospitality.notes: Tourism businesses must obtain a tourism license from the Ministry of Tourism in addition to the standard CR and municipal license.

requirements: Commercial Registration (CR) with hotel activity code
Minimum room count per star classification
Fire safety and evacuation plan approval
items.classification_criteria: Star rating determined by MOT inspection based on room count, facility amenities, service quality, and staff ratios
items.notes_ar: يجب الحصول على تصنيف نجوم من وزارة السياحة. التصنيف يتم بناءً على معايير محددة تشمل عدد الغرف والمرافق وجودة الخدمة
items.notes_en: Star classification is mandatory and determined by MOT inspection. Hotels must display their star rating prominently. Re-inspection occurs every 3 years.

requirements: Commercial Registration with furnished apartments activity code
items.classification_criteria: Classified into 3 categories: Standard, Superior, and Deluxe based on unit size, furnishing quality, and amenities
items.notes_ar: تشمل الشقق المفروشة والشقق الفندقية. يجب أن تحتوي على استقبال ونظام أمني
items.notes_en: Includes both serviced apartments and furnished units for short-term rental. Must comply with Ejar platform registration for rental contracts.

requirements: Commercial Registration with resort activity code
Municipal license and land use permit
Recreational facilities (pool, spa, or beach access)
On-site F&B facilities with SFDA license
items.classification_criteria: Classified 3-5 stars based on location, facilities, room quality, recreational offerings, and service level
items.notes_ar: المنتجعات السياحية تتطلب تقييم أثر بيئي وموافقة المركز الوطني للرقابة على الالتزام البيئي
items.notes_en: Resorts require environmental clearance from NCEC. Coastal resorts need additional permits from the Royal Commission for coastal development zones.

requirements: Parking facilities for at least 20 vehicles
Basic F&B service or proximity to dining
items.classification_criteria: Classified as 1-3 stars based on room quality, cleanliness standards, and roadside amenities
items.notes_ar: تقع عادةً على الطرق السريعة بين المدن. تتطلب مواقف سيارات كافية
items.notes_en: Located along inter-city highways. Must comply with MOT roadside hospitality standards. Parking capacity is a key requirement.

requirements: Commercial Registration with travel agency activity code
Bank guarantee of SAR 100,000 (outbound) or SAR 50,000 (inbound)
Qualified Saudi manager with tourism diploma or equivalent
items.classification_criteria: Licensed separately for inbound, outbound, or both. Outbound agencies require IATA accreditation.
items.notes_ar: وكالات السفر الخارجية تتطلب اعتماد IATA وضمان بنكي. الوكالات الداخلية تحتاج ضمان بنكي أقل
items.notes_en: Outbound agencies must hold IATA accreditation and a SAR 100,000 bank guarantee. Inbound-only agencies need SAR 50,000 guarantee. Both require a Saudi national as branch manager.

requirements: Commercial Registration with tour operator activity code
Fleet of licensed transport vehicles or contracted transport agreement
items.classification_criteria: Licensed for domestic tours, international tours, or adventure tourism. Each category has specific vehicle and safety requirements.
items.notes_ar: منظمو الرحلات يحتاجون تأمين مسؤولية مهنية وخطة استجابة للطوارئ
items.notes_en: Tour operators must carry professional liability insurance and maintain an emergency response plan. Adventure tourism operators need additional safety certifications.

requirements: Commercial Registration with event management activity code
Qualified event safety officer on staff
items.classification_criteria: Licensed for conferences, exhibitions, festivals, or sporting events. Large-scale events (1000+ attendees) require additional GEA and civil defense approvals.
items.notes_ar: تنظيم الفعاليات الكبيرة يتطلب موافقة هيئة الترفيه والدفاع المدني
items.notes_en: MICE organizers need dual licensing from MOT and GEA. Events over 1,000 attendees require separate GEA event permits per event.

requirements: Saudi national or resident with valid iqama
Completion of MOT-accredited tour guide training program (120 hours)
Proficiency in Arabic and at least one foreign language
Knowledge test on Saudi heritage, history, and geography
items.classification_criteria: Licensed for general, heritage/cultural, adventure, or religious tourism specializations
items.notes_ar: يجب اجتياز برنامج تدريبي معتمد واختبار معرفي. المرشدون السعوديون لهم أولوية
items.notes_en: Saudi nationals are prioritized. Non-Saudi guides must hold specific language skills and serve inbound tourists only. License renewed annually with CPD requirement.

items.license_type_en: Hajj and Umrah Service Provider License
requirements: Commercial Registration with Hajj/Umrah services activity code
Ministry of Hajj and Umrah operating license
Approved accommodation in Makkah and Madinah
Licensed transport fleet or contracted agreement
Saudi national company (100% Saudi ownership required)
Minimum 3 years experience in tourism sector
items.classification_criteria: Licensed for domestic Hajj services, international Umrah packages, or both. International operators must have MOH country-specific quota allocation.
items.notes_ar: يتطلب ملكية سعودية كاملة وضمان بنكي كبير. تخصيص الحصص يتم سنوياً من وزارة الحج
items.notes_en: Requires 100% Saudi ownership. Bank guarantee and insurance requirements are the highest in the tourism sector. Quota allocations are managed annually by the Ministry of Hajj.

requirements: Commercial Registration with adventure tourism activity code
First aid trained staff (minimum 2 per trip)
Participant waiver and medical fitness documentation process
items.classification_criteria: Covers diving, hiking, rock climbing, desert safari, zip-lining, paragliding, and water sports. Each activity type requires specific safety certifications.
items.notes_ar: أنشطة المغامرات تتطلب تأمين مسؤولية عالي ومدربي سلامة معتمدين دولياً
items.notes_en: Adventure operators must carry high liability coverage. Equipment must pass annual safety inspections. Guides must hold internationally recognized certifications for their specific activity.

hotel_classification.notes: Star classification is determined by MOT inspection teams. Hotels must meet all minimum criteria for their target star level.

service_standards: 24-hour front desk, room service, and concierge

gea_entertainment_permits.notes: All entertainment events in Saudi Arabia require GEA permits. Fees vary by event type and capacity.

requirements: Intellectual property clearance for displayed content
safety_requirements: Accessible facilities for persons with disabilities

requirements: Saudi Olympic Committee or relevant federation approval

items.authority_ar: وزارة الخارجية + وزارة الداخلية + وزارة السياحة

details.notes_en: Saudi tourist e-visa launched September 2019. Citizens of 63 countries can apply online or on arrival. GCC nationals do not need a visa.

requirements: Heritage impact assessment for developments near registered sites
SHA approval for any tourism activity at heritage sites
Certified heritage guide for group visits
No commercial construction within 200m buffer zone of UNESCO sites
details.notes_en: SHA oversees 7 registered heritage areas. Tourism operators near heritage sites must obtain SHA clearance. UNESCO sites have additional buffer zone restrictions.

items.name_ar: متطلبات سياحة البحر الأحمر (مشروع أمالا والبحر الأحمر)

requirements: RSG operator approval and concession agreement
Carbon neutrality plan or offset agreement
details.notes_en: Red Sea Global mandates net-positive conservation. Operators must meet strict environmental standards. Tourism capacity is capped to protect marine ecosystems.

requirements: NEOM business registration and operator license
details.notes_en: NEOM operates as a special economic zone with its own regulatory framework. Tourism operators must register directly with NEOM and comply with its technology and sustainability standards.

items.name_ar: متطلبات سياحة العلا (الهيئة الملكية لمحافظة العلا)

requirements: Heritage sensitivity training for all staff
RCU-approved architectural design for new builds
Local community employment commitment (minimum 30% AlUla residents)
details.notes_en: RCU manages all tourism activities in AlUla governorate. Operators must align with the AlUla Master Plan and prioritize local employment and heritage preservation.

salary_benchmarks.section_name_ar: مرجعيات الرواتب في قطاع السياحة والضيافة
salary_benchmarks.saudization_notes_en: Tourism and hospitality sector requires 40% Saudization under Nitaqat. Tour guide positions require Saudi nationals. Hotel management roles have higher Saudization targets.
salary_benchmarks.saudization_notes_ar: يتطلب قطاع السياحة والضيافة نسبة توطين 40% وفق نظام نطاقات. وظائف المرشدين السياحيين مقصورة على السعوديين

roles.notes: Varies significantly by hotel star rating and chain affiliation. 5-star international chains at the higher end.
Saudization strongly encouraged for front-facing roles. Bilingual staff command higher salaries.
International hotel chains often recruit executive chefs globally. Sous chefs and line cooks have lower Saudization requirements.
Tour guide positions are reserved for Saudi nationals. Specialized heritage and adventure guides earn at the higher end.
Branch managers must be Saudi nationals per MOT regulations.
